summary: A recorded clip, posted as a repost, of a man with light hair in a dark suit and a white 'USA' cap speaking at a lectern bearing the presidential seal. He stands centered against a dark blue drape with an American flag to his left and a dark presidential flag to his right. The framing is a single steady wide shot held throughout the sampled frames. No burned-in captions appear in the sampled frames.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and white 'USA' cap stands at a lectern with the presidential seal, an American flag at left and a presidential flag at right against a blue drape.
The same steady wide shot of the speaker continues at the lectern.
The speaker remains at the lectern in the same framing near the end of the clip.

notable_text: USA; SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
